Class Route

java.lang.Object
model.Route
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Route extends Object implements Serializable
Represents the route followed by a drone.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Route

      public Route(CollectionCenter origin, Hospital destination)

  • Method Details

    • addWaypoint

      public void addWaypoint(Position position)
      Adds an intermediate waypoint to the route.
      Parameters:
      position - waypoint position

    • removeWaypoint

      public void removeWaypoint(Position position)
      Removes a waypoint from the route.
      Parameters:
      position - waypoint to remove

    • computeDistance

      public double computeDistance()
      Computes the total route distance in canvas units. Sums distances: origin -> waypoints -> destination.
      Returns:
      total distance

    • estimateTime

      public double estimateTime(Drone drone)
      Estimates the flight time based on drone speed.
      Parameters:
      drone - the drone that will fly this route
      Returns:
      estimated time in hours

    • getOrigin

      public CollectionCenter getOrigin()

    • getDestination

      public Hospital getDestination()

    • getWaypoints

      public List<Position> getWaypoints()
